title: Fast Bushy Leaves
description: Makes the leaves in minecraft BUSHY
body:
After hours of editing and udjusting of the textures, I hope you like it and play with it or show it, or at least follow me.

This ResourcePack changes the minecraft leaves from the boring one into a bushy fancy and fast one, to get more fps and play happily


![Small Show Case](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26901b7636f3fc21f71982f66795d6f05883eb52_0.webp)
